content.scenarioHint: 你在楼道里遇到一位新搬来的邻居，想友好地打招呼并确认对方身份，可以询问对方的名字或表达欢迎。
expectedAnswers: Hi! I'm your neighbor on the second floor. You must be the new person who just moved in?
Hey there! Welcome to the building! I'm Alex — what's your name?
Hi! I noticed you just moved in. I live right across the hall — nice to meet you!
Hello! I hope you're settling in well. I'm your neighbor — mind if I ask your name?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了问候和确认对方是新邻居的意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常打招呼的口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'new neighbor', 'move in', 'name' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你在楼道遇到新邻居，想问候他们。他们看起来很不熟悉这个地方，想知道他们的名字或更多关于他们的信息。
expectedAnswers: Welcome to the building! Can I help you with anything?
Hi, how do you like our building so far?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问邻居信息的意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯

content.speakerText: Hey, I'm your neighbor on the 3rd floor. I noticed you're moving in — need any help?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我是三楼的邻居，看到你在搬东西，需要帮忙吗？
expectedAnswers: Oh, thanks so much! I'm Sam. I think I'm okay for now, but I'll let you know if I need a hand!
That's really kind of you! I'm Alex. I appreciate the offer!
Hi! I'm Jamie. Not right now, but I'll definitely take you up on that later!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应帮助提议并自我介绍
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的感谢语和委婉表达（如 'I'll let you know'）
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、不生硬，符合邻里间自然互动
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'help', 'I'm', 'appreciate' 等社交关键词
